ISessionAuthDbConfig Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The ISessionAuthDbConfig type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
AdditionalAuthProps
AllowPersistentAuth Obsolete.
Returns a value indicating whether the authentication may be persisted (i.e. as a persistent non-session cookie) on the client.
AllowUsersWithoutSecondFactor
AuthenticationType
AuthProviders
ExcludedAuthentifiers
ManualAuthentifiers
Gets the list of valid authenticators for manual authentication.
Product
SecondaryAuth
SsoAuthentifiers
Gets the list of valid authenticators for SSO authentication.
